name: Ashish Mohite
title: Co-Founder & CEO
quote: Leads ScaleReal’s vision, strategy, and technology direction with a strong focus on building scalable, outcome-driven products. Combines deep technical expertise with business understanding to guide architecture, shape solutions, and ensure every engagement delivers meaningful business impact.

name: Atul Shashikumar
title: Co-Founder & COO
quote: Leads ScaleReal's operations, delivery and product execution. Aligns people, processes, and priorities so the organisation grows without chaos, ensuring consistency in how teams operate, collaborate, and deliver as ScaleReal evolves.
